title: Iconic Items
description: Gives small Icons to items that hard to distinguish like Waxed Copper Blocks, Infested Blocks, Trapped chest for easier identification.
body:
![Items like Waxed Copper, Infested Stone with Item Icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2dc896cd20ea6ceca509d496426a49b6b84abcbe.png)
This Resource Pack gives small Icons to items that hard to distinguish like Waxed Copper Blocks, Infested Blocks, Trapped chest for easier identification.

Item Included:
- Waxed Copper Blocks
- Infested Stone Blocks
- Trapped Chest
- Suspicious Blocks
- Petrified Oak Slab
